scripts.dist: npm run build:scanner && npm run build && electron-builder --arm64
scripts.dist:arm64: npm run build:scanner && npm run build && electron-builder --arm64
scripts.dist:x64: npm run build:scanner:x64 && npm run build && electron-builder --x64
scripts.dist:universal: npm run build:scanner:universal && npm run build && electron-builder --universal
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:arm64 && npm run dist:x64 && npm run dist:universal
scripts.release: npm run build:scanner:universal && npm run build && electron-builder --universal --publish always
scripts.build:scanner: swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macos13 -o resources/scanner-bin resources/scanner/main.swift && chmod +x resources/scanner-bin
scripts.build:scanner:x64: swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macos13 -o resources/scanner-bin resources/scanner/main.swift && chmod +x resources/scanner-bin
scripts.build:scanner:universal: swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macos13 -o resources/scanner-bin-arm64 resources/scanner/main.swift && swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macos13 -o resources/scanner-bin-x86_64 resources/scanner/main.swift && lipo -create resources/scanner-bin-arm64 resources/scanner-bin-x86_64 -output resources/scanner-bin && chmod +x resources/scanner-bin && rm resources/scanner-bin-arm64 resources/scanner-bin-x86_64
